title: 'Zootopia 2' to premiere on Disney+ March 11
fullText:
1 of 4 | "Zootopia 2" is set to premiere on Disney+ March 11. Image courtesy of Disney
 
 
 

March 3 (UPI) -- The BAFTA-winning, animated blockbuster, Zootopia 2, is set to premiere on Disney+ March 11.
"Rookie cops Judy Hopps (voiced by Ginnifer Goodwin) and Nick Wilde (voiced by Jason Bateman) find themselves on the twisting trail of a great mystery when Gary De'Snake (voiced by Ke Huy Quan) arrives in Zootopia and turns the animal metropolis upside down," a synopsis said.

"To crack the case, Judy and Nick must go undercover to unexpected new parts of town, where their growing partnership is tested like never before."
The movie has earned more than $1 billion in box office receipts since its theatrical release began last November. It is the sequel to 2016's Zootopia.

summary: The BAFTA-winning, animated blockbuster, "Zootopia 2," is set to premiere on Disney+ March 11. Voice cast includes Ginnifer Goodwin and Jason Bateman.
